CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:CalibratedCameraAnglePixelMapper.kt:CalibratedCameraAnglePixelMapper$focalLength == null || opticalCenter == null || preActiveArray == null || activeArray == null

ComplexCondition:CreateTideFragment.kt:CreateTideFragment$(tides.isEmpty() && estimateAlgorithm == TideEstimator.Clock) || // Manual lunitidal UTC only requires a lunitidal interval is entered (estimateType == EstimateType.LunitidalIntervalManualUTC && lunitidalInterval == null) || // Manual lunitidal local requires a lunitidal interval and location are entered (estimateType == EstimateType.LunitidalIntervalManualLocal && (lunitidalInterval == null || location == null)) || // Auto lunitidal interval requires at least one tide (tides.isEmpty() && estimateType == EstimateType.LunitidalIntervalAuto)
ComplexCondition:FragmentBallisticsCalculator.kt:FragmentBallisticsCalculator$bulletSpeed != null && bulletSpeed.speed > 0 && zeroDistance != null && scopeHeight != null
ComplexCondition:FragmentToolTriangulate.kt:FragmentToolTriangulate$location1 == null || location2 == null || direction1 == null || direction2 == null
ComplexCondition:GeoJsonPointRenderer.kt:GeoJsonPointRenderer$shape == GEO_JSON_PROPERTY_MARKER_SHAPE_CIRCLE || (shape == null && iconRes == null && bitmap == null)

ComplexCondition:LineClipper.kt:LineClipper$!(start.x < bounds.left && end.x < bounds.left || start.x > bounds.right && end.x > bounds.right || start.y < bounds.bottom && end.y < bounds.bottom || start.y > bounds.top && end.y > bounds.top)
ComplexCondition:MapEntity.kt:MapEntity$percentX1 != null && percentY1 != null && longitude1 != null && latitude1 != null
ComplexCondition:MapEntity.kt:MapEntity$percentX2 != null && percentY2 != null && longitude2 != null && latitude2 != null
ComplexCondition:MapLayerBackgroundTask.kt:MapLayerBackgroundTask$!isDirty && !isInvalid && areBoundsEqual( newBounds, lastRunBounds ?: CoordinateBounds.empty ) && zoom == lastRunZoom
ComplexCondition:PhotoMapTileSource.kt:PhotoMapTileSource$internalSelector == null || loadPdfs != lastLoadPdfs || backgroundColor != lastBackgroundColor || featureId != lastFeatureId
ComplexCondition:PixelInterpolators.kt:BilinearInterpolator$x1y1 == null || x1y2 == null || x2y1 == null || x2y2 == null || x1y1.isNaN() || x1y2.isNaN() || x2y1.isNaN() || x2y2.isNaN()

ExplicitItLambdaParameter:LighterPackIOService.kt:LighterPackIOService${ it -> val name = it.getOrNull(nameIdx) ?: "" val category = parseCategoryString(it.getOrNull(categoryIdx) ?: "") val weight = it.getOrNull(weightAmountIdx)?.toFloatOrNull() val unit = it.getOrNull(weightUnitIdx)?.let { parseWeightUnit(it) } ?: WeightUnits.Grams val packedQty = it.getOrNull(packedQtyIdx)?.toDoubleCompat() ?: 0.0 val desiredQty = it.getOrNull(desiredQtyIdx)?.toDoubleCompat() ?: it.getOrNull(qtyIdx) ?.toDoubleCompat() ?: 0.0 val isOptional = parseOptional(it.getOrNull(optionalIdx)) PackItem( 0, 0, name, category, amount = packedQty, desiredAmount = desiredQty, weight = weight?.let { Weight.from(it, unit) }, isOptional = isOptional ) }

VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Control matrix var B = Matrix.zeros(stateSize, controlSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Innovation covariance var Sk = Matrix.zeros(measurementSize, measurementSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Kalman gain (optimal) var K = Matrix.zeros(stateSize, measurementSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Observation model var H = Matrix.zeros(measurementSize, stateSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Observation noise covariance var R = Matrix.zeros(measurementSize, measurementSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Predicted estimate covariance var Pk_km1 = Matrix.zeros(stateSize, stateSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Predicted state estimate var Xk_km1 = Matrix.zeros(stateSize, 1)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Process noise covariance var Q = Matrix.zeros(stateSize, stateSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// State transition model var F = Matrix.zeros(stateSize, stateSize)
VariableNaming:KalmanFilter.kt:KalmanFilter$// Updated estimate covariance var Pk_k = Matrix.zeros(stateSize, stateSize)
